task_completion.description: The agent logged into FreeMED using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Day Sheet or daily schedule section in FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED interface shows the 'Day Sheet', 'Schedule', or 'Reports' section being accessed.

task_completion.description: The agent generated the schedule report for today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated report, print preview, or schedule view is visible, displaying today's date.

task_completion.description: The generated schedule includes the expected patients.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The names 'Robert Chen', 'Maria Santos', and 'David Washington' are visible in the generated schedule or print preview.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the report as a PDF file at /home/ga/Documents/daily_schedule.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or print dialog shows the file being saved as 'daily_schedule.pdf' in the 'Documents' folder (/home/ga/Documents/), or a file manager confirms its presence.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeMED web interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and FreeMED GUI, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated directly from the FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The print dialog (Print to PDF) or export feature of the browser/FreeMED is used, rather than a word processor or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the expected patient names into a document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation process is visible within the FreeMED interface, showing the patient data being pulled dynamically from the system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/daily_schedule.pdf'. The schedule must include the following three patients: Robert Chen, Maria Santos, and David Washington. The report must be generated for today's date.
